label: Front Desk Pak
blurb: Clerical, Legal Support & Local Office Admin. Document routing, signature chasing, and gatekeeping.

skills.label: Voicemail To Text Triage
skills.method: Transcribes incoming office voicemails; flags messages containing words like "urgent," "sue," or "cancel" for the boss, archiving the rest.

skills.label: Office Supply Inventory Reorder
skills.method: Connects to an Amazon Business account; when the office manager clicks "Low Toner" on a dashboard, it instantly places the reorder.

skills.label: Mail Sorting And Scanning Router
skills.method: Scans daily physical office mail, uses NLP to identify if it's an invoice, a legal notice, or junk, and emails it to the correct department.

skills.label: Appointment Cancellation Filler
skills.method: When a patient cancels a 9 AM cleaning at 8 AM, the system instantly texts the top 5 people on the waitlist offering the spot.

skills.label: Vendor W9 Collector
skills.method: Automatically emails the window washer or local handyman requesting their W-9 tax ID, halting their invoice payment until they upload it.
trigger_examples: saves the bookkeeper from tax-season nightmares

skills.label: Medical Record Fax Confirmer
skills.method: Sends a digital fax to a specialist, then automatically calls/pings their office 24 hours later to confirm the 50-page document was actually received.
trigger_examples: closes the loop on archaic healthcare communication

skills.label: Dental Insurance Verification Bot
skills.method: Logs into the Delta Dental portal via API/RPA, verifies the patient's remaining annual maximum, and calculates their copay before they walk in the door.
trigger_examples: prevents patients from getting hit with surprise bills

skills.label: Court Date Reminder Texter
skills.method: Pulls from the firm's calendar and texts clients 48 hours, 24 hours, and 2 hours before their hearing with the exact courthouse address and room number.
trigger_examples: stops clients from missing court and getting bench warrants

skills.label: Client Intake Conflict Checker
skills.method: Scans a local law firm's entire historical database to ensure they haven't previously represented the husband of a new wife calling for a divorce.

skills.label: Notary Journal Entry Logger
skills.method: Uses OCR to scan a driver's license, pulling the name, ID number, and expiration date directly into the digital state notary journal.
trigger_examples: speeds up signings and prevents state audit failures
